title: Transcript:Odd Old Man
wikitext:
{{Transcript|npc}}
{{Transcript list|Odd Old Man|Bones (NPC){{!}}Bones}}

==Starting Rag and Bone Man I==
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Can I help you with something?
* '''Player:''' Well, err...who are you, and what are all these bones doing here?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Errr...
* '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
* '''Odd Old Man:''' I'm an archaeologist. I work with the museum.
* '''Player:''' An archaeologist?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Yes.
* '''Player:''' Well that explains the bones...sort of...but what are you doing all the way out here?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Errr...
* '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumble.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' I'm collecting bones for the museum.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' They have asked me to rig up some displays of second and third age creatures using their bones, so that people can come and...well, look at them.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' I need to get them into some sort of order before I begin, but I've run into a bit of a snag.
* '''Player:''' What sort of a snag?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Well, I need to have all the bones I'm going to use here, and placed into some sort of order.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' However, I seem to have discovered I am a few short.
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Anything I can do to help?}}
** '''Player:''' Anything I can do to help?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Errr...
** '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
** '''Odd Old Man:''' There is something you could do for me. I'm going to be busy...err...
** '''Sack:''' Mumble
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Sorting, yes, sorting these bones out ready for the museum, but I need a few more.
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Will you help me out by grabbing some?
** {{tselect|Start the Rag and Bone Man I quest?}}
** {{topt|Yes}}
*** '''Player:''' Yes. I'll give you a hand.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' You will?  {{sic|extra space}}Excellent!
*** '''Sack:''' Snicker.
*** '''Player:''' Where do you need me to dig?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Dig?
*** '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Oh, you must have got the wrong end of the stick.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' I need some fresh, whole bones to replace ones that have become damaged.
*** '''Player:''' What?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Err...
*** '''Sack:''' Mumblemumblemumblemumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumblemumble. Mumble.
*** '''Player:''' Excuse me...
*** '''Sack:''' Shhh!
*** '''Player:''' Sorry...
*** '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumble.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Ok, got it.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Ok, here is the thing. While sorting out what bones I do have I managed to lose or damage a few. If you can get me some fresh, unbroken bones to use as replacements then I can get on with things.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' That make things clearer?
*** '''Player:''' Well, it makes some sense I suppose...
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Great. If you can get me a bone from a Goblin, a Bear, a Big Frog, a Ram, a Unicorn, a Monkey, a Giant rat and a Giant Bat then I'll be able to move on with the...
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Displays...
*** '''Player:''' So you just want me to bring you these bones and that will be that?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Well, I wouldn't mind you sticking them in a pot and boiling them in vinegar first, if you don't mind.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' There is a Wine Merchant in Draynor called Fortunato that sells the stuff you'll need.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' You can even use my pot-boiler if you want.
*** '''Player:''' Why do I need to boil them in vinegar?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' It gets them bright and sparking white.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' It's an archaeologist thing.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Just put the bone in a pot of vinegar, throw some logs on the fire, put the pot in the holder and light the logs.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' It takes a while for the vinegar to evaporate, but the bone will be nice and clean in the end.
*** '''Player:''' All right, I'll be back later.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Bye!
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|No}}
*** '''Player:''' No.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Oh...I see.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Well, never mind me young man, I'll just stagger over here under my massive burden, and continue my thankless task.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Unaided and alone...
*** '''Player:''' Wow, trying a guilt trip much?
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Well, good luck with that.}}
** '''Player:''' Well good luck with that!
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Thanks stranger!
** '''Odd Old Man:''' What a polite young [man/woman]...
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Well, back to work!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Where is that mumbling coming from?}}
** '''Player:''' Where is that mumbling coming from?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Errr...
** '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
** '''Odd Old Man:''' What mumbling?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Anyway, I have enough problems of my own without dealing with a delusional adventurer.
** {{tact|other}}

=== Historical dialogue ===
<!-- Before [[9 November]] [[2022]] [[Update:Diversity & Inclusion Changes and Quest Speedrunning Updates]] -->
* {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|Yes}}
** {{tact|[[Rag and Bone Man I]] is started.}}
** '''Player:''' Yes. I'll give you a hand.
** '''Odd Old Man:''' You will? Excellent!
** '''Sack:''' Sniggersnigger
** '''Player:''' Where do you need me to dig?
** {{tact|above}}

==After initally declining the quest==
* '''Player:''' Hello there!
* '''Player:''' I was just passing and I wondered if you still needed someone to help with the bones?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Errr...
* '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
* '''Odd Old Man:''' There is something you could do for me. I'm going to be busy...err...
* '''Sack:''' Mumble
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Sorting, yes, sorting these bones out ready for the museum, but I need a few more.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Will you help me out by grabbing some?
* {{tselect|Start the Rag and Bone Man I quest?}}
* {{topt|Yes}}
** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|No}}
** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|Where is that mumbling coming from?}}
** {{tact|above}}

==After Rag and Bone Man I==
* '''Player:''' So how is the sorting going?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Err...
* '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
* '''Odd Old Man:''' It's going well, especially now I have all the bones I need.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' There are still a few bits and pieces I wouldn't mind, but that's the way things go.
* '''Player:''' Well if I see any bones I think you might like I'll bring them over.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Cheers, we, err, that is myself and the museum staff, really appreciate it.
* '''Sack:''' Snicker.
* {{tact|end}}

==After Rag and Bone Man II==
* {{tcond|If the player chose the ram skull helm (or both items) after completing Rag and Bone Man II and no longer possesses it:}}
** '''Player:''' Can I have a replacement helm? I managed to lose the last one.
** '''Odd Old Man:''' No problem. I have plenty after all.
** '''Player:''' Thanks!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player chose the bonesack (or both items) after completing Rag and Bone Man II and no longer possesses it:}}
** '''Player:''' Can I have a replacement bonesack? I managed to lose the last one.
** '''Odd Old Man:''' No problem. I have plenty after all.
** '''Player:''' Thanks!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player chose the ram skull helm after completing Rag and Bone Man II and still has possession of it:}}
** '''Player:''' How's the sorting going?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Oh, the 'sorting' is going very well, very well indeed.
** '''Player:''' I'm glad to hear it!
** {{tselect|Select an Option}}
** {{topt|Could I exchange this helm for the bonesack?}}
*** '''Player:''' Can I exchange this helm for the bonesack?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' I don't see why not.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' There you go.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Come up and see me if you want to swap back.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Could I have a bonesack as well?}}
*** '''Player:''' Could I have a bonesack as well?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' I... do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' There you go.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Come up and see me if you lose it.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Where was that mumbling coming from anyway?}}
*** '''Player:''' Where was that mumbling coming from anyway?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Errr...
*** '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' What mumbling?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' You must be hearing things. I think you need to have a lie down.
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player chose the bonesack after completing Rag and Bone Man II and still has possession of it:}}
** '''Player:''' How's the sorting going?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Oh, the 'sorting' is going very well, very well indeed.
** '''Player:''' I'm glad to hear it!
** {{tselect|Select an Option}}
** {{topt|Could I exchange this bonesack for the helm?}}
*** '''Player:''' Can I exchange this bonesack for the helm?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' I don't see why not.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' There you go.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Come up and see me if you want to swap back.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Could I have a helm as well?}}
*** '''Player:''' Could I have a helm as well?
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' I... do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' There you go.
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Come up and see me if you lose it.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Where was that mumbling coming from anyway?}}
*** {{tact|above}}
* {{tcond|If the player owns both the ram skull helm and the bonesack:}}
** '''Player:''' How's the sorting going?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Oh, the 'sorting' is going very well, very well indeed.
** '''Player:''' I'm glad to hear it!
** '''Player:''' Where was that mumbling coming from anyway?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' Errr...
** '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
** '''Odd Old Man:''' What mumbling?
** '''Odd Old Man:''' You must be hearing things. I think you need to have a lie down.
** {{tact|end}}

==Trading in [[giantsoul amulet]]==
===First time===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Hello?
* '''Sack:''' Mumblemumble
* '''Player:''' I found this amulet. Do you know what it is?
* '''Odd Old Man:''' It doesn't look like anything I've seen in the past, I don't think I'll have a use for it.
* '''Sack:''' Ahem!
* '''Odd Old Man:''' Although actually, thinking about it, I can take it off your hands if you'd like?
* '''Player:''' For free? I've helped the museum enough, do you have anything I could exchange it for?
* '''Sack:''' Mumble
* '''Odd Old Man:''' I could give you 30 big bones per amulet, I've built up quite a collection recently.
* {{tcond|If the player has one giantsoul amulet:}}
** {{tselect|Exchange your Giantsoul amulet (uncharged) for 30 big bones?}}
** {{topt|Yes}}
*** {{tact|receives=30 noted [[big bones]]}}
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Here's 30 big bones, come back if you find another amulet.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|No}}
*** '''Player:''' No thank you. maybe{{sic}} another time.
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player has more than one giantsoul amulet:}}
** {{tinput|How many amulets would you like to exchange?}}
** {{tcond|If zero:}}
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If not zero:}}
*** {{tact|receives=[Input * 30] noted [[big bones]]}}
*** '''Odd Old Man:''' Here's [input * 30] big bones, come back if you find another amulet.
*** {{tact|end}}

===Subsequent dialogue===
* {{tinput|How many amulets would you like to exchange?}}
* {{tact|above}}
